Video.summary: We tear down Project Spartan to rebuild it, but its surprisingly strong engine changes our plans.
Video.title: Kaiser Jeep Chaos

Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: Behold "Outlaw" VIN #1! Mustang Brothers' supercharged '67 Fastback is a Brittany Blue beast.
Video.title: Mustang Brothers

Video.summary: "Dark Matters," Jason Mode's '68 C10, is a subtly modded, powerful truck with killer black and red style.
Video.title: Jason Mode - Dark Matters C10

Video.summary: A burned-up 6.4L Gen III HEMI is revived with some old school hot rod parts.
Video.title: Old School/New School HEMI

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc head out to salvage an old B-Body that has seen better days.
Video.title: Salvage Yard Special

Video.summary: Detroit Muscle begins their journey of bringing a ’69 Plymouth Road Runner back from the brink.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 1: Suspension Tension

Video.summary: Our ’69 Road Runner, nicknamed Road Burner, gets a Gen III Hemi engine swap.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant
’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant
’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant

Video.summary: The ’69 Road Runner gets an exterior upgrade.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint
’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint
’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint

Video.summary: We make all the right connections and dash towards the finish line our ’69 Road Runner.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish
’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish
’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish

Video.summary: We create a one-of-a-kind emblem and then use some wool to clear up Road Burner’s eyes.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!
’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!
’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!

Video.summary: We are going to show how mother nature’s handiwork can create a masterpiece worthy of a Hot Wheel.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 7: School’s Out!

Video.summary: Our 1969 Jeep M715 Project Spartan is getting a frame-up overhaul to look like a truck again.
Video.title: Lighting the Way Forward

Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?

Video.summary: As we resume work on our 1966 Chevy Nova, we learn that this project may go from Starstruck to Struck Out.
Video.title: Project Struck Out / 69 GTO Part 1

Video.summary: The warden's calling for diagnostics for Detroit Muscle's next prisoner, their 1969 Pontiac GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 2 - Medical Checkup

Video.summary: Our 1969 Pontiac GTO needs to bulk up before breaking out so we modify the chassis and install new fuel lines.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 3 - Yard Time

Video.summary: Project Henchman is hoping to get a new look with a new paint job that'll make this '69 Pontiac GTO shine.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 4 - Prison Tats

Video.summary: The 1969 GTO Project Henchman gets a shiny new exterior look.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 5 - New Chains

Video.summary: Steel meets style – Today the boys finally lay down some paint on their ’69 GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel install a new third pedal and show you the do’s and don’ts on how to bleed the transmission
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 7 - Midnight Masterpiece

Video.summary: The guys enter the winding maze of wiring as they install a new ECU on Project Henchman.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 8 - Power Moves

Video.summary: GTO gets new exhaust and wheels, plus learn how to adjust wheel offset.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Video.summary: We upgrade a '69 GTO with new glass, power windows, and a complete interior makeover.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 10 – Pane Relief

Video.summary: 1969 GTO Project Henchman's first drive! Installing a spoiler, stripes & 3D-printed pieces.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 11 – Black Beauty

Video.summary: A good find: Marc and Tommy go on the hunt for a certain top-shelf Mopar.
Video.title: Hard Charger

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Dodge Charger needs some sheet metal replaced.
Video.title: Hard Charger: Heavy Metal

Video.summary: Dig's Rod Shop unveils a '47 Chevy pickup: a "Zey Bronze" stunner with 640hp and unique barn wood details.
Video.title: Digs Rod Shop - 1947 Chevy 3100

Video.summary: Shane Lile's purple-over-red '55 Chevy Bel Air Gasser: an eye-popping, custom drag strip beast!
Video.title: Shane Lile - Gasshole

Video.summary: We're building a 427ci pump-gas LSx for a Music City Trucks C10, aiming for serious hot rod power.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 1

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're twin-turboing our 600+ HP 427ci Small Block Chevy with new EFI, pushing "Baby Blue" to the limit!
Video.title: Twins for the Win

Video.summary: We introduce our Low-Fi S-10 project and look at the history of the Mini Truck Slam world.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Video.summary: We tear into our Low-Fi S-10 project and the rear suspension is our focus.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Lay Frame

Video.summary: Our Chevy Low-Fi S-10 project continues and today is front suspension teardown and upgrades
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Video.summary: We send our S-10 out to an expert who will create and install a custom audio system and interior.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Video.summary: We are on the home stretch of our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Slam Project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Video.summary: The final touches are added to our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Truck project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!
Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!
Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew cuts a rusty old floor out of a '69 Dodge Charger and replace it.
Video.title: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Image.alt: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Video.summary: The time has come to paint Project Hard Charger.
Video.title: Hard Charger…or Midnight Rider?

Video.summary: Work continues on a 1969 Dodge Charger to adapt a Hellcat drivetrain to work in it; Tommy visits OPGI.
Video.title: Hard Charger – Hellcrate Install

Video.summary: We're adding new brakes, taillights, power windows, and fresh interior paint to our '56 Chevy 210 Gasser.
Video.title: Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!

Image.alt: Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!
Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!
Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!

Video.summary: It's the start of our all new MuscleTrux series and to kick it off, Ford versus Chevy.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 1

Video.summary: Bowtie boy Ryan's got a big play for using big displacement to make big power for his entry.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 2: 1990 Chevrolet 454 SS

Video.summary: It's Blue Oval boy Kevin's turn to take over the shop.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 3: 1994 Ford Lightning

Video.summary: It's another shot in our MuscleTrux series as Kevin's 1994 Ford Lightning prepares for battle.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 4

Video.summary: Ryan returns fire as his 1990 Chevy 454 SS also gets dropped down into the weeds.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 5

Video.summary: It's a chassis dyno shootout to see what kind of power our sport trucks are making.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 6

Video.summary: It's finally time to lay it on the line as we put the two trucks in head to head competition.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 7

Video.summary: It’s all the stuff you bowtie fans are gonna love! Check out our 1971 Chevy C10.
Video.title: '71 Chevy C10

Video.summary: Brendon Graeves' 1000hp twin-turbo LS '11 BMW M3: a carbon-bodied drift monster engineered for domination!
Video.title: Hot Shots Drift Car

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel give the ’69 Road Runner’s interior a much-needed makeover.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 4: Insider Trading

Video.summary: We fabricate a new cross member, mounting brackets, and install the transfer case on our 1969 Jeep Kaiser.
Video.title: Assembling Our Base

Video.summary: Is custom exhaust worth it on a budget build?
Video.title: Tune & Tone
